{"query":"Boeing Lufthansa Rolls-Royce July 2026 flight tests novel engine inlet fuel efficiency noise announcement details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1785,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.airwaysmag.com/new-post/boeing-lufthansa-rolls-royce-787-fuel-noise-tech","title":"Boeing, Lufthansa, Rolls-Royce to Test 787 Fuel, Noise Technologies","content":"1 day ago — The partners will use a Lufthansa-bound Boeing 787-9 to test a new engine inlet and noise-reducing flight procedures.
‍SEATTLE — Boeing, Lufthansa Group, and Rolls-Royce will begin flight testing new technologies designed to improve fuel efficiency and reduce aircraft noise using a Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner assigned to Lufthansa.
Rolls-Royce provided engineering support and oversight for operating the Trent 1000 engine with the Next Generation Inlet installed.
“This program is the culmination of a decade of collaboration with Boeing, built on a shared ambition to reduce noise, improve efficiency and unlock more sustainable flight,” Alan Newby, Rolls-Royce director of research and technology, said in the announcement.
The technologies are being tested under Phase III of the Federal Aviation Administration’s CLEEN program, short for Continuous Lower Energy, Emissions and Noise."},{"url":"https://aerocrewnews.com/2026/07/16/boeing-lufthansa-rolls-royce-partner-to-test-technologies-to-improve-fuel-efficiency-reduce-noise/","title":"Boeing, Lufthansa, Rolls-Royce partner to test technologies to improve fuel efficiency, reduce noise - Aero Crew News","content":"1 day ago — SEATTLE — Boeing, Lufthansa and Rolls-Royce will soon conduct flight tests of innovations meant to improve fuel efficiency and reduce noise.Read more
- The Next Generation Inlet, a reduced-length engine inlet demonstrator with advanced acoustic treatments.
The testing, which begins later this month at the Boeing site in Glasgow, Montana, is being conducted on a Boeing 787 Dreamliner jet that’s serving as Boeing’s 2026 ecoDemonstrator Explorer airplane.
These enhancements have the potential to make our airplanes even more valuable to our partners, including customers like Lufthansa and suppliers like Rolls-Royce.”
“These tests demonstrate how the public-private partnership of the CLEEN program supports the development and integration of advanced technologies into current and future aircraft,” said Julie Marks, executive director of the FAA’s Office of Environment and Energy.
A leading global aerospace company and top U.S. exporter, Boeing develops, manufactures and services commercial airplanes, defense products and space systems for customers in more than 150 countries."},{"url":"https://www.eastmidlandsbusinesslink.co.uk/mag/featured/rolls-royce-joins-boeing-and-lufthansa-for-787-efficiency-trials/","title":"Rolls-Royce joins Boeing and Lufthansa for 787 efficiency trials | East Midlands Business Link","content":"“Boeing works tirelessly to deliver the aerospace innovations of today and tomorrow,” said Boeing Chief Technology Officer Lane Ballard.
We are pleased to support this year’s Boeing ecoDemonstrator Explorer program alongside Rolls-Royce” said Grazia Vittadini, Chief Technology Officer, Lufthansa Group.
If you’re in business, East Midlands Business Link is for you."},{"url":"https://www.aviation24.be/manufacturers/boeing/787-dreamliner/boeing-lufthansa-and-rolls-royce-to-test-fuel-saving-and-noise-reduction-technologies-on-787/","title":"Boeing, Lufthansa and Rolls-Royce to test fuel-saving and noise-reduction technologies on 787 - Aviation24.be","content":"The flight tests, which begin later this month in Glasgow, Montana, will use a Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner equipped with Rolls-Royce Trent 1000 engines.
The partners will also test Intelligent Operations flight paths, using data-driven departure and arrival procedures to optimise fuel burn and minimise aircraft noise around airports.
Federal Aviation Administration’s Continuous Lower Energy, Emissions and Noise (CLEEN) programme, which supports the development of technologies to improve aircraft efficiency and environmental performance."},{"url":"https://seekingalpha.com/news/4614477-boeing-lufthansa-rolls-royce-to-test-fuel-saving-noise-reduction-tech-on-787","title":"Boeing, Lufthansa, Rolls-Royce to test fuel-saving, noise-reduction tech on 787 (BA:NYSE) | Seeking Alpha","content":"1 day ago — Boeing, Lufthansa and Rolls-Royce flight-test 787-9 tech to cut fuel burn and airport noise, supporting greener aircraft.
The program is testing new technologies like the Next Generation Inlet and intelligent flight paths aimed at supporting more fuel-efficient engines and improved operational efficiency."},{"url":"https://www.rolls-royce.com/media/press-releases/2026/16-07-2026-rr-partners-with-boeing-and-lufthansa-to-test-technologies-to-improve-fuel-efficiency-and-reduce-noise.aspx","title":"Rolls-Royce partners with Boeing and Lufthansa to test ...","date":"1 day ago","content":"1 day ago — Rolls-Royce is partnering with Boeing and Lufthansa to conduct flight tests of innovations meant to improve fuel efficiency and reduce noise.Read more"}]}
